name: czech-b1-flashcards
description: Czech A2/B1 flashcards with a static web app, shared study logic, and an Expo mobile foundation.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check data/vocabulary.js && node --check data/extended-lemmas.js && node --check data/verb-forms.js && node scripts/validate-data.js && node scripts/export-shared-seed.js --check && node --test packages/shared/test/*.test.mjs
